$comment: Curated subset of https://github.com/awesome-opencode/awesome-opencode that OpenOptimized ships as suggested installs. The PluginsBrowser panel reads this list and invokes OpenCode's skill/plugin installer per entry. Entries are source-of-truth; bumping refs is a reviewable change.

plugins.name: Opencode Mem
plugins.description: Persistent memory across sessions with vector DB, dual memory scopes, and a web UI. Complements MemPalace for lighter-weight scratchpad memory.

plugins.name: Agent Memory
plugins.description: Self-editable memory blocks inspired by Letta. Useful for long-running agents.

plugins.name: Oh My Opencode
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration with LSP, AST, MCP tools and a Claude Code compatibility layer. Complements DeerFlow mode.

plugins.name: Dynamic Context Pruning
plugins.description: Token optimization by removing obsolete tool outputs. Complements context-mode MCP for finer-grained pruning during a session.

plugins.name: Morph Fast Apply
plugins.description: 10,500+ tokens/sec code editing integration. Dramatically speeds up large refactor diffs.

plugins.name: Model Announcer
plugins.description: Injects the current model name into the prompt for self-aware model routing.

plugins.name: Opencode Quota
plugins.description: Track token usage and quota across providers. Recommended when mixing Ollama with cloud fallback.

plugins.name: Opencode Canvas
plugins.description: Terminal UI components (calendars, documents) for visualizing tool output.
